free_text: New data on partial photoneutron reactions (gamma,n),
sections  were  obtained  using  not only methods of
neutron multiplicity sorting but alternative  method
of   induced   activity  also.  That  gives  to  one
possibility to compare such kind experiments results
with  data evaluated in the frame of new method free
from the problems of experimental  determination  of
neutron  multiplicities.  The joint analysis of data
various experiments was carried out. Using special
calculated in  the  frame  of  modern   photonuclear
reaction  model  new reliable and free from problems
of   neutron   multiplicity   sorting    data    for
were evaluated.  As  initial  for  evaluation  total
neutron yield reaction cross section SIG-exp(gamma,xn)
that was used as obtained for Saclay data by summing
of   partial   reaction   cross    sections    data:
Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
